productDisplayName: Vans Men Rata Vulc Brown Shoes
description: Want to save the earth? This could be the answer – the uppers of this vans casual shoe are made of hemp – similar in feel to cotton canvas, but much easier to grow, making hemp a smart sustainable choice for those trying to conserve the earth's resources. Not just ecologically friendly, Vans has also come up with a great, versatile shoe which will take you from day to evening thanks to the smart brown colour and stylish shape. Upper Canvas uppers for durability and comfortLace-ups for a snug FitBrand name tag on the side seam and on the back, on the lastingCushioned footbed for all day comfortMidsoleEVA midsole for better shock absorptionOutsoleRubber outsole for durabilityReverse waffle pattern for better gripShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth or use a brush to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
